flags.note: יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.
נֶפֶשׁ — "soul" (Greek-influenced: non-material self) vs. "life" (the whole living person) vs. "self" (the person as subject). Hebrew nefesh is embodied, not a separate immaterial substance.
